key.name: enabled
key.description: Master switch, also toggled from Quick Settings.

key.name: start-minutes
key.summary: Start of the daily window, in minutes since midnight
key.description: Default 480 = 08:00. If start is later than end, the window wraps past midnight (e.g. 22:00 to 06:00).

key.name: end-minutes
key.summary: End of the daily window, in minutes since midnight (inclusive)
key.description: Default 1320 = 22:00. A beat falling exactly on the end time still sounds.

key.name: interval-minutes
key.description: Beats are aligned to the clock, counted from the anchor time: with the default midnight anchor, an interval of 20 beats at :00, :20 and :40 of every hour.

key.name: anchor-minutes
key.summary: Anchor for the beat grid, in minutes since midnight
key.description: Beat k falls at anchor + k * interval; the grid extends both directions, so beats also fall before the anchor. Major-beat counting is anchored here too. Default 0 = midnight.

key.name: major-every
key.summary: Every Nth beat is a major beat
key.description: Counted from the anchor, so with a 20-minute interval, a midnight anchor and N=3 the major beat lands on the hour. 0 disables major beats entirely; 1 makes every beat major.

key.name: minor-sound
key.description: A bare name selects a bundled sound from the extension's sounds/ directory; a path containing '/' selects a custom audio file. The empty string falls back to the default.
